scripts.dev:backtest-ui: concurrently -n api,viz -c blue,green "npm run start --prefix backtest-api" "npm run dev --prefix prosperity-viz"
scripts.dev:backtest-ui:open: concurrently -n api,viz,open -c blue,green,magenta "npm run start --prefix backtest-api" "npm run dev --prefix prosperity-viz" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && node ./scripts/open-backtest-page.mjs"
